11	/// When the cache directory cannot be created (e.g., due to permissions), we should show a
12	/// chained error message that indicates we failed to initialize the cache.
13	#[test]
14	#[cfg(unix)]
15	fn cache_init_failure() -> Result<()> {
16	    use uv_test::ReadOnlyDirectoryGuard;
17	
18	    let context = uv_test::test_context!("3.12");
19	
20	    let pyproject_toml = context.temp_dir.child("pyproject.toml");
21	    pyproject_toml.write_str(
22	        r#"
23	        [project]
24	        name = "project"
25	        version = "0.1.0"
26	        requires-python = ">=3.12"
27	        dependencies = ["iniconfig"]
28	        "#,
29	    )?;
30	
31	    // Create a read-only directory that will serve as the parent of the cache.
32	    // The guard sets it to read-only and restores original permissions on drop (including panic).
33	    let cache_parent = context.temp_dir.child("cache_parent");
34	    fs_err::create_dir(&cache_parent)?;
35	    let _guard = ReadOnlyDirectoryGuard::new(cache_parent.path())?;
36	
37	    // Point the cache to a subdirectory within the read-only parent
38	    let cache_dir = cache_parent.child("cache");
39	
40	    // Filter both the relative path (in the first line) and absolute path (in the cause)
41	    let context = context
42	        .with_filter((r"cache_parent/cache", "[CACHE_DIR]"))
43	        .with_filter((
44	            r"failed to create directory `.*`",
45	            "failed to create directory `[CACHE_DIR]`",
46	        ));
47	
48	    // Build the sync command manually to use our custom cache directory.
49	    // We can't use context.sync() because it adds --cache-dir with the default cache.
50	    let mut command = Command::new(get_bin!());
51	    command
52	        .arg("sync")
53	        .arg("--cache-dir")
54	        .arg(cache_dir.path())
55	        .current_dir(context.temp_dir.path());
56	    context.add_shared_env(&mut command, false);
57	
58	    // Running a command should fail with a chained error about cache initialization
59	    uv_snapshot!(context.filters(), command, @"
60	    success: false
61	    exit_code: 2
62	    ----- stdout -----
63	
64	    ----- stderr -----
65	    error: Failed to initialize cache at `[CACHE_DIR]`
66	      Caused by: failed to create directory `[CACHE_DIR]`: Permission denied (os error 13)
67	    ");
68	
69	    Ok(())
70	}

## Summary: UV Cache Internal Structure

I've completed a thorough exploration of the uv cache system. Here are my findings organized by your requirements:

### 1. Cache Crate Location & Main Files

- `cli.rs` (140 lines) - CLI argument parsing

- `archive.rs` - Archive handling

### 2. CacheBucket Enum Definition

**Location:** `crates/uv-cache/src/lib.rs`, lines 934-1177

The enum defines 11 cache buckets with versioned directory names:


### 3. Cache Directory Structure & Layout

---

## What gets built

`uv cache stats` — a preview-gated subcommand that walks the 10 standard cache buckets (`wheels-v6`, `sdists-v9`, `flat-index-v2`, `git-v0`, `interpreter-v4`, `simple-v21`, `archive-v0`, `builds-v0`, `environments-v2`, `binaries-v0`) and prints an aligned table with per-bucket sizes and a total. `--human` / `-H` / `--human-readable` switches to human-readable output (e.g. `1.2 GiB`).

---

## 8 files, each with a specific job

| # | File | What changes |
|---|------|-------------|
| 1 | `crates/uv-preview/src/lib.rs` | Add `CacheStats = 1 << 28` to `PreviewFeature` enum + `"cache-stats"` in `as_str()` / `FromStr` / test |
| 2 | `crates/uv-cli/src/lib.rs` | Add `Stats(StatsArgs)` variant to `CacheCommand` enum; add `StatsArgs { human: bool }` struct (identical pattern to `SizeArgs`) |
| 3 | `crates/uv/src/lib.rs` | Add dispatch arm right after the `Size` arm (~line 1181): `CacheCommand::Stats(args) => commands::cache_stats(…)` |
| 4 | `crates/uv/src/commands/mod.rs` | Add `mod cache_stats;` + `pub(crate) use cache_stats::cache_stats;` |
| 5 | `crates/uv/src/commands/cache_stats.rs` | **New** — iterates `CacheBucket::iter()`, measures each bucket with `diskus::DiskUsage`, formats an aligned table, prints separator + total |
| 6 | `crates/uv-test/src/lib.rs` | Add `cache_stats()` command helper + `with_filtered_cache_stats()` filter (mirrors `cache_size`/`with_filtered_cache_size`) |
| 7 | `crates/uv/tests/it/main.rs` | Register `mod cache_stats` under `#[cfg(all(feature = "test-python", feature = "test-pypi"))]` |
| 8 | `crates/uv/tests/it/cache_stats.rs` | **New** — 3 integration tests: empty cache, raw bytes after install, `--human` after install |

---

## Critical implementation note
